title: AN ACT AMENDING PRIORITY NUMBERED ONE (QUEZON I), PAGE SEVENTY-EIGHT, APPENDIX B OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED AND THIRTEEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 6936 / 53 OG No. 17, 5523 (September 15, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1782, June 21, 1957 ]

AN ACT AMENDING PRIORITY NUMBERED ONE (QUEZON I), PAGE SEVENTY-EIGHT, APPENDIX B OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED AND THIRTEEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and Rouse of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Priority numbered one (Quezon I), page seventy-eight of Appendix B, Republic Act Numbered Sixteen hundred and thirteen, is hereby amended to read as follows:

"1. Municipal district of Dingalan Central School Construction .................. P 5,000.00."

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1957.
